description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short raglan sleeves and printed branding on the chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironCrafted from soft fabric, this t-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look.
